name: Huawei alarm
description: Huawei alarm/logbuffer focused preset for alarms, interface state, BGP, NTP, LLDP and OPS events.

red: \b(?:hwLocalFaultAlarm_active|linkDown_active|bgpBackwardTransition_active|BGP direct connect-interface down|The local fault alarm has occurred|Interface physical link is down)\b
green: \b(?:hwAlarmClearedReportTrap|bgpBackwardTransition_clear|OPS_LOGIN|OPS_OPER_SUCCESS|Succeeded in establishing the OPS connection|The BGP FSM enters the Established state)\b
